description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compile Examples that compiles and runs various PlatformIO examples for ESP8266 and ESP32 boards. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events, excluding certain paths. For each board, use a matrix strategy to run multiple examples, caching pip and PlatformIO dependencies, setting up Python, installing PlatformIO and the ESP-Mail-Client library, and then running the examples using pio ci.
